title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: Find My Device does not prompt for location permission after it is revoked via Android system settings post-onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the onboarding flow.
2. During onboarding, accept the Location permission prompt when requested.
3. Navigate to Android Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions.
4. Revoke the Location permission by toggling it off.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or locate the Find My Device option on the device home screen.
expected: The app should detect that Location permission is revoked and display an appropriate prompt requesting the user to grant Location permission again. The user should be able to re-enable Location permission from the prompt, and after granting it, the Find My Device map should load and function correctly.
